entities.description: The ability of groundnut to resist late leaf spot

entities.description: A population development method used to create a mapping population for multiple traits

entities.name: CONVERGENT CROSSING SCHEME
entities.description: The scheme used to develop the MAGIC population

entities.description: An experimental method conducted in a light chamber to assess disease resistance

entities.description: The process of evaluating disease resistance in nurseries

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: One of the locations where field screening nurseries were conducted

entities.name: ARS KASBE DIGRAJ
entities.description: One of the locations where field screening nurseries were conducted

entities.name: INCUBATION PERIOD
entities.description: A component of LLS resistance referring to the time before symptoms appear

entities.name: LATENT PERIOD
entities.description: A component of LLS resistance referring to the time between infection and sporulation

entities.name: LESION DIAMETER
entities.description: A component of LLS resistance measuring the size of the disease spot

entities.name: LEAF AREA DAMAGE
entities.description: A component of LLS resistance measuring the percentage of leaf area affected

entities.name: DISEASE SCORE
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the severity of LLS

entities.name: GPBD 4
entities.description: A resistant parent and check variety of groundnut

entities.name: ICGR 171413
entities.description: A MAGIC line showing low lesion diameter and leaf area damage

entities.name: ICGR 171443
entities.description: A MAGIC line showing low lesion diameter and leaf area damage

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: An approach used in breeding to harness minor alleles for trait improvement

entities.name: GENES
